name: YouTube Transcript
summary: Extract the full timestamped transcript of a YouTube video.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

params.name: language
params.description: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: YouTube Summarizer
summary: AI summary (key points, topics, sentiment) of a YouTube video.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

params.name: language
params.description: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: YouTube Video Details
summary: Metadata + engagement stats for a YouTube video.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

name: YouTube Comments
summary: Comments on a YouTube video.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Channel Details
summary: Channel info & subscriber/stats for a YouTube channel.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

name: YouTube Search
summary: Search YouTube videos by keyword.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query or keywords (min 2 chars).

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Channel Videos
summary: List a channel's uploaded videos.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Playlist Videos
summary: List videos in a YouTube playlist.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube playlist URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/playlist?list=ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Video Download
summary: Direct download URLs for a YouTube video.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

name: YouTube Shorts Transcript
summary: Transcript of a YouTube Short.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube Shorts URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/shorts/ID.

params.name: language
params.description: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: YouTube Shorts Summarizer
summary: AI summary of a YouTube Short.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube Shorts URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/shorts/ID.

params.name: language
params.description: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: YouTube Shorts Stats
summary: Metadata + stats for a YouTube Short.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube Shorts URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/shorts/ID.

name: YouTube Shorts Comments
summary: Comments on a YouTube Short.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube Shorts URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/shorts/ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Channel Shorts
summary: List a channel's Shorts.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Channel Streams
summary: List a channel's live/past streams.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Hashtag Search
summary: Search YouTube videos by hashtag.

params.name: q
params.description: Hashtag with or without the # (min 2 chars).

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Comment Replies
summary: Replies to a specific YouTube comment.

params.name: url
params.description: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

params.name: comment_id
params.description: ID of the parent comment to fetch replies for (from the comments endpoint).

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 50, max 500. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Channel Playlists
summary: List a channel's playlists.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: YouTube Community Posts
summary: List a channel's community (posts) tab.

params.name: url
params.description: YouTube channel URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/@handle or /channel/UC...

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: TikTok Popular Hashtags

params.description: Topic or keyword to discover trending hashtags for. Default "trending".

params.name: limit
params.description: Max items to return. Default 20, max 100. Billed per result.
